Roven Cross-Defendants' Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Roven Cross-Defendants' Special Motion To Strike.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Roven cross defendants' unopposed special motion to strike is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

CROSS-DEFENDANT ARTHUR LIPTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Arthur Lipton's unopposed motion to strike cross complaint is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar May-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANTS ROVEN, INC. (A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION), ROBBIE VALDESPINO, TAJ VALDESPINO, STEVE VALDESPINO, VALVE VALDESPINO and RODRIGO NEVADO'S Joinder In Special Motion Of Cross-Defendant Lipton To Strike The Cross-Complaint Under Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 425.16.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Roven, Inc. (A California Corporation), Robbie Valdespino, Taj Valdespino, Steve Valdespino, Valve Valdespino, Rodrigo Nevado's unopposed joinder in Arthur Lipton's motion to strike is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
